message:
feat: add unified function traits analysis framework

Add FunctionTraits framework for call graph analysis:
- Build call graph once, query for multiple codegen decisions
- Tracks: async/await, param mutations, errors, allocator needs
- Detects: pure functions, tail recursion, generators, closures
- Enables: DCE, TCO, memoization decisions at codegen time

Query API in NativeCodegen:
- shouldUseStateMachineAsync() - I/O vs CPU-bound async
- isParamMutated() - var vs const parameters
- funcNeedsErrorUnion() - !T vs T return type
- funcNeedsAllocator() - allocator parameter
- funcIsPure() - memoization/comptime eval
- funcCanUseTCO() - tail call optimization
- funcIsGenerator() - generator state machine
- funcIsDeadCode() - dead code elimination

Consolidates scattered analysis from:
- mutation_analyzer.zig -> mutates_params
- param_analyzer.zig -> captured_vars
- async_complexity.zig -> async_complexity
